category_sources: Official homepage is for GPP, the Generic Preprocessor.
source_facts.description says GPP is a general-purpose preprocessor with customizable syntax.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is GPP - Generic Preprocessor.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GPP page and contains description, syntax, options, examples, and download information.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was identified from source_facts.homepage or official search results; package repositories were rejected as not upstream source-control.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes macro, syntax, and command-line usage.
source_facts.description identifies GPP as a customizable-syntax preprocessor.
